name: Improved Clinch Knot
description: The most commonly used knot to attach a hook to the line.

name: Palomar Knot
description: A very strong and reliable knot, ideal for braided lines.

name: Figure Eight Loop
description: A simple loop knot that does not slip.

name: Uni Knot
description: A versatile knot used for attaching hooks, swivels, or joining lines.

name: Double Uni Knot
description: Used to join two lines together, especially lines of different diameters.

name: Blood Knot
description: A classic knot for joining two lines of similar diameter.

name: Albright Knot
description: Great for joining lines of different materials, like braid to mono.

name: FG Knot
description: A very strong and slim knot for connecting braid to leader line.
